properties.text: Fork-choice weight/head selection must gate attestation inclusion solely by att.slot/target.epoch eligibility, never by local receipt wall-clock time; arrival-based gating causes nodes to diverge on canonical head under differing network latency.
properties.assertion: att in fc_weight(st) -> eligible(att.slot,att.target.epoch,st) and not depends_on(weight(att), wallclock_arrival(att))
properties.label: fork-choice

properties.text: On timeout-triggered eviction from a bounded pending-item queue/buffer, evict every entry whose age exceeds the timeout, not just the head, so items stuck behind one expired slot cannot starve later arrivals or exhaust queue capacity.
properties.assertion: evict = {e in queue : now - e.enqueue_time > timeout}, not queue.pop_front() only

properties.text: After every inflate()/decompress chunk, add its length to a running total and compare with '>' against a fixed max-decompressed-size constant; abort and discard the stream on the first chunk that exceeds it, never only after full inflation.

properties.assertion: no unchecked +,-,* on height/epoch/index vars in checkpoint/slashing paths; all use checked_add/sub/mul or bounds-checked equivalents
properties.label: beacon-chain:slashing
properties.lean_statement: ∀ {Validator : Type u} {Hash : Type v} [DecidableEq Validator] [DecidableEq Hash] [Fintype Validator] (τ : Threshold) (stake : Validator → Nat) (vset : Hash → Finset Validator) (parent : HashParent Hash) (genesis : Hash) (st : State Validator Hash) (b1 : Hash) (b2 : Hash) (h : Nat), justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b1 h → justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b2 h → b1 ≠ b2 → q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st

lean_hypotheses.name: hj1
lean_hypotheses.type: justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b1 h
lean_hypotheses.head: GasperBeaconChain.Core.justified

lean_hypotheses.name: hj2
lean_hypotheses.type: justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b2 h
lean_hypotheses.head: GasperBeaconChain.Core.justified

lean_must_establish: justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b1 h
justified τ stake vset parent genesis st b2 h
b1 ≠ b2
properties.lean_proof_code: fun τ stake vset parent genesis st b1 b2 h hj1 hj2 hne => ⋯
properties.lean_conclusion: q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st
properties.lean_proof_source:
theorem two_justified_same_height_slashed
    ... (model parameters elided in sample fixture) ... :
    q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st :=
  fun τ stake vset parent genesis st b1 b2 h hj1 hj2 hne => ⋯

properties.text: Verify pre-quorum validation rejects malformed/duplicate/out-of-range attester weights before they contribute to attesting balance, so total_active_balance and quorum math cannot be inflated to force a false slashing witness.
properties.assertion: validate(attester_weight) before sum; reject if weight<=0 || weight>effective_balance_max || duplicate(attester_id)
properties.label: beacon-chain:justification-and-finality
properties.lean_statement: ∀ {Validator : Type u} {Hash : Type v} [DecidableEq Validator] [DecidableEq Hash] [Fintype Validator] (τ : Threshold) (stake : Validator → Nat) (vset : Hash → Finset Validator) (parent : HashParent Hash) (genesis : Hash) (st : State Validator Hash), qIntersectionWitnessB τ stake vset st ≠ none ↔ q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st
properties.lean_proof_code: fun τ stake vset st => Iff.intro (fun h => ⋯) (fun h => ⋯)
properties.lean_conclusion: qIntersectionWitnessB τ stake vset st ≠ none ↔ q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st
properties.lean_proof_source:
theorem q_intersection_slashed_iff_exists_witness
    ... (model parameters elided in sample fixture) ... :
    qIntersectionWitnessB τ stake vset st ≠ none ↔ q_intersection_slashed τ stake vset st :=
  fun τ stake vset st => Iff.intro (fun h => ⋯) (fun h => ⋯)
